epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: Ok. Friday I am off on a mad adventure so off grid from about 2
Forgot to ask re crowdfunding mate. Got July 7 in diary. Is that still on?
Hi! just coming up for air. I have calls so planning to be at home so that would work fine Xx

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires urgent handling and succession planning.
lead.deck: You have a departing team member flagged as a task with no due date or urgency marker, suggesting it may not yet be formally processed. Clarity on timing and next steps is critical before the situation creates operational gaps.
